product_overview: DeepVoice Pro is a React frontend that lets users learn about the product and submit audio, video, or image files for deepfake analysis, then view classification and confidence results. The app provides a landing page with CTAs, an Analyze page for file uploads and results, and an About page describing mission and accuracy.
core_goals: Discover what the product does and its claimed performance from the landing and about pages
Upload a media file (audio, video, or image) and receive a deepfake classification with a confidence score
Quickly navigate between Home, Analyze, and About pages to access features and documentation

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: Introduce the product, highlight key features and provide clear entry points to the Analyze and About pages so users can begin analysis or learn more.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See product feature overview and CTA options -> Navigate to /analyze
Navigate to / -> See highlighted features and mission summary -> Navigate to /about -> Read brief performance callouts

features.name: Deepfake Analysis Upload
features.description: Allow users to submit a media file for deepfake detection and display a loading state followed by a classification and confidence score when analysis completes.
user_flows: Navigate to /analyze -> Click the file upload area -> Select a media file from device -> See loading status while analysis runs -> See analysis result with classification and confidence
Navigate to /analyze -> Click the file upload area -> Select an unsupported file type -> See a validation error about unsupported file type

features.name: About Page Details
features.description: Present the project's mission, accuracy claims, and performance statistics so users can evaluate the model's reported capabilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read the mission statement and performance statistics
